exploration_notes: The bug is in WindowOperator.processElement() (line 293-447) and EvictingWindowOperator.processElement() (line 113-274). In the merging window branch, when isWindowLate(actualWindow) returns true at line 369/188, the element is skipped via `continue` and `isSkippedElement` remains true.
